heading: Limitations
body:
[$vectorSearch](pipe.$vectorSearch) can't be used in
[view definition](manual/core/views) and the following pipeline
stages:

- [$lookup](manual/reference/operator/aggregation/lookup) sub-pipeline [^id1]

- [$facet](manual/reference/operator/aggregation/facet) pipeline stage

[^id2]: You can pass the results of [$vectorSearch](pipe.$vectorSearch)
    to this stage.
